overview: Vanguard Cyber is a high-tech cyberpunk terminal dashboard that scans URLs and text for security threats. It uses a Naive Bayes classifier and Regex heuristics to calculate threat probability, with a Thesis Defense Mode that exposes the full ML pipeline — tokenization, audit log, model parameters, and live mitigation alerts.
features: Cyberpunk black-screen terminal dashboard with monospace font
URL/text threat scanner with real-time probability scoring
Naive Bayes classifier with alpha smoothing and training vocabulary
Regex heuristic rules (punycode, IP links, @ symbols)
Red screen + SENDER QUARANTINED alert for high-risk threats
Model Diagnostics: tokenization display and raw probability score
Heuristic Audit Log: triggered rules with weights
Model Parameters card: alpha value and vocabulary size
Active Blocking Protocol with timestamped system log
